title: Business Investment Analyst
description:
Company Introduction: TWO Family Office (“TWO FO”) is a Singapore-based family office with a long-term, global investment perspective. We are committed to generating sustainable value across market cycles. Our diversified portfolio spans public equities, fixed income, private equity, real estate, and alternative investments. (www.twofo.org) We are seeking a driven and detail-oriented Business Investment Analyst to join our investment team. This is an exciting opportunity to work closely with senior management and play a key role in investment research, evaluation, and portfolio management across global markets and multiple asset classes.

Key Responsibilities

  • Manage multi-business investment projects globally, develop business investment strategy by market research & identify, catch business expectations, delivery business project results and key stakeholder management (CRM) etc.
  • Prepare business investment memos and support full due diligence process, ensuring all relevant factors are considered.
  • Monitor and manage performance of existing portfolio companies, ensuring alignment with investment objectives.
  • Conduct macro-level industry and market research to identify investment opportunities.
  • Evaluate business investment opportunities by building financial models and conducting valuation analysis.
  • Track and analyses portfolio data for accurate business & financial reporting.
  • Perform stock research and analysis as well as conducting and managing ad hoc portfolio related duties
  • Update and review fund/portfolio performances and ensure compliance with regulatory and compliance standards.
  • Collect, update and analyse data; perform financial modelling and track model accuracy by comparing projections with actual financial outcome.
  • Any ad hoc tasks may be assigned as determined by the management.

Requirements

  • Bachelor or master’s degree of Economic, Finance, business or MBA
  • Minimum 1 year of relevant working experience preferred
  • Experience with business investment project management & development with business analysis mindset and knowledges.
  • Manage investment strategies, including public equities, fixed income, and derivatives.
  • Familiarity with financial analysis and business investment strategies – good technical and comfortable with number crunching
  • Proficiency in Excel; Bloomberg and financial modelling is advance.
  • Highly analytical, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple priorities under tight timelines. 
  • Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and organizational skills
  • Strong ownership and interpersonal abilities to follow up and develop investment project
  • A proactive team player with the ability to manage multiple priorities and trading strategies.
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills, both written and verbal.
  • Professional English required; German proficiency is preferred only for roles requiring communication with German-speaking clients, suppliers, stakeholders, business partners, or handling documents in German.

If you are interest, please share your update resume to hr@twofo.org for further discussion. Thank you and look for to hearing from you!

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
